message:
test(integration): update and expand integration test suite for parser and runtime changes

Update existing integration tests to align with AST restructuring
(BindingPattern migration) and expanded language coverage:

- eval_pipeline_integration.rs: Adjust pipeline test expectations
- expected_loss_selector_enrichment_integration.rs: Update fixture refs
- flow_lattice_integration.rs: Add destructuring-related lattice tests
- frx_flake_quarantine_workflow.rs: Expand quarantine lifecycle tests
- lexical_environment_integration.rs: Update scope tests for patterns
- lowering_binding_conflict_integration.rs: Test destructuring conflicts
- lowering_coverage_integration.rs: Expand statement lowering coverage
- parser_trait_ast.rs: Update trait implementations for new AST nodes
- runtime_hotspot_optimization_campaign.rs: Add optimization benchmarks
- static_analysis_graph_integration.rs: Simplify graph construction
- static_semantics_integration.rs: Update for BindingPattern semantics

New test files:
- ifc_declassification_runtime.rs: IFC declassification runtime tests
- test262_case_vectors.jsonl: Test262 conformance test case vectors

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
